name: PAR20 LED Bulb – 7 Watts – 500 Lumens – Energy Star and UL listed.
description: Features: Seamless Dimming : Provides 10%-100% dimming for tailored lighting, suitable for bedrooms, kitchens, living spaces, and offices, with compatibility for recessed cans and downlights. Weatherproof Design : IP65 wet-rated, ensuring durability in outdoor spaces like patios, gardens, and decks, as well as wet zones indoors. Precise Spotlighting : 40° beam angle delivers focused lighting with softened edges, perfect for highlighting architectural features, artwork, and decorative elements. Energy Savings : Cuts energy use by up to 85%, offering a long-lasting alternative to traditional bulbs with reduced maintenance costs. Reliable and Certified : UL listed with FCC and RoHS certifications, backed by a 5-year warranty and a 25,000-hour lifetime for dependable performance.
short_desc: PAR20 LED Bulb – 7 Watts – 2700K/3000K/4000K/5000K/6000K – 500 Lumens – Energy Star and UL listed. Specifications: Lumen Output: 500 lm Efficacy: 67 lm/W Wattage: 7W Wattage Equivalent: 75W Input Voltage: 120V Operating Temperature: 4°F – 104°F Dimmable: Yes Color Temperature Options: 2700K / 3000K / 4000K / 5000K / 6000K CRI: 80+ Beam Angle: 40° IP Rating: IP65 Moisture Rating: Wet Rated Bulb Base: E26 Finish: Frosted Material: Aluminum, Polycarbonate Compliance: Not available for sale in California Certifications: Energy Star, UL, FCC, RoHS Switching Cycles: 30,000 Lifetime: 25,000 Hours Warranty: 5 Years
